center.name: 馬庫伊拉山脈
center.summary: 馬庫伊拉山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Buff-breasted wren、Golden-winged sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: collinus inhabits the dry scrub of Colombia's Serranía de Macuira

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fratruelis can be found in Serranía de Macuira, located on the Guajira Peninsula of northern Columbia
